refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what customer churn means and how it relates to our model. I should also learn about historical sales and interaction data.
I need to figure out how to evaluate the model's performance. This might include understanding accuracy, precision, recall, and maybe F1 score.
I should look up what overfitting is and why it's a problem. I need to know how to tell if our model is overfitting.
I need to learn what performance metrics are important for our model and how to calculate them.
I should research common methods to improve a model, like cross-validation or adjusting parameters.
I need to outline how to structure my final report, including numerical results and a summary.
